description: Address 5 issues from the semantic review of Phase 10+11: (1) idempotency race on concurrent calls, (2) null ambiguity in IdempotencyKeyStore.get(), (3) WS gateway silent degradation, (4) soft-delete treated as hard-delete, (5) offline queue replay without circuit-breaking.
steps: Step 1: Fix withIdempotency race condition by adding a pending-promise map so concurrent callers await the same promise.
Step 2: Fix null ambiguity in IdempotencyKeyStore.get() by wrapping stored values internally and returning a discriminated result.
Step 3: Fix WS gateway silent degradation by using pino structured logging at warn level.
Step 4: Fix soft-delete treated as hard-delete by adding toSoftDelete[] in RetentionEvaluation.
Step 5: Fix OfflineOperationQueue replay without circuit-breaking by adding retryCount and maxRetries with dead-letter support.
Step 6: Update tests to cover the fixed behavior.
Step 7: Run pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint and fix any issues.
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent withIdempotency calls with the same key only execute the operation once
IdempotencyKeyStore correctly distinguishes stored null from key-not-found
WS gateway emits structured warn-level log when running in degraded mode
RetentionEvaluation has a toSoftDelete[] category distinct from toDelete[]
OfflineOperationQueue tracks retry counts and marks operations as permanently failed after max retries
